rootCause: The player exposed newly constructed presentation display objects before the compatibility kernel produced and rendered the cartridge's first complete source-authored frame. Yielding _init frames were also rendered only after ordinary logical updates, so startup animation state could be stale, incomplete, or invisible.

properties: reference and HD surfaces begin hidden
an incomplete yielding initialization frame remains behind the loading surface
the first complete source-authored frame is rendered and exposed atomically
initialization animation renders on host ticks before ordinary logical updates
a post-initialization render failure hides both surfaces and reports a terminal startup error

privateDiagnostic.packageVerification: Both corrected standalone packages passed scripts/verify-web-package.mjs. These diagnostics do not replace fresh runtime-bound screenshots or human review.

remainingGate: Recapture both complete browser evidence sets from the corrected visual-runtime identities, rebuild the hash-bound review packets, perform Agent pre-review of the unparameterized standalone startup and a non-title gameplay boundary, then request human review.
